Machine Learning Engineer (Toronto)

Ashby Demo Inc is hiring a Machine Learning Engineer to join our applied AI team in Toronto.

Responsibilities

  • Build and ship ML pipelines for production scoring.
  • Optimize inference latency and cost across cloud (AWS/GCP).
  • Partner with platform engineers on automation tooling.

Required

  • 3+ years building production ML systems.
  • Python, PyTorch or TensorFlow.
  • Experience with microservices and Docker.
